{{CargoRelic
|name=King Menkaure & Queen
|class_id=22640
|rank=S
|affct=ART
|birthday=08-24
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (1.62%)
|description=On Aug 24, 2600 BC, the artisans completed the statue of King Menkaure & Queen.<br>This statue was built during the Fourth Dynasty of ancient Egypt and is a typical imperial statue of that era. The statue depicts a solemn pharaoh couple standing side by side, with their bodies vertical to the ground, adhering to the characteristic Frontalism style of Egyptian art, exhibiting the pharaoh's majesty, which makes it a valuable artifact with both artistic and historical value.
|fame=53
|art=97
|fth=65
|civ=66
|tech=51
|ss1=Demon Minion HP +1%<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail ATK +1<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail DEF +1<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss2=Demon Minion HP +2%<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail ATK +2<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail DEF +2<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss3=Demon Minion HP +3%<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail DEF +3<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss4=Demon Minion HP +5%<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail DEF +5<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss5=Demon Minion HP +7%<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail ATK +7<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail DEF +7<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss6=Demon Minion HP +10%<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail DEF +10<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150
|ss7=Demon Minion HP +10%<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 3 basic fusions, Snail DEF +10<br>Basic Fusions: 150/150<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, 2x White Card Drops +15%
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Snail DEF +600
|skill3=[[File:Forestsanctum skill III.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: This Relic's ART +15
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Pharaoh's Memory|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Toner, +200|orange}}
|3name=Menkaure's Royal Wife|3rec=91.57M|3atk=272504|3defense=172722|3hp=13511697|3weak=33880
|4name=King Menkaure|4rec=155.62M|4atk=423138|4defense=262847|4hp=26727281|4weak=39406
|Arec=297.93M|Aatk=719962|Adefense=430600|Ahp=76339170|Aweak=51627
}}}}
